prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, develop a specific protein binder targeting Genome polyprotein (contains prM/E, NS1, NS3, NS5) (flavivirus polyprotein (E glycoprotein, NS3 protease/helicase)) expressed by Zika virus. The binder should achieve nanomolar affinity. outline a methodology for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using AlphaFold2, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Genome polyprotein (contains prM/E, NS1, NS3, NS5); organism: Zika virus; catalogue version v1.0
